category.scope_note: Electric vehicle charger and EV supply equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Pakistan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger files against Pakistan PSQCA standards adoption, NEPRA public EV charging-station framework, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 connector expectations, grid-connection, safety, metering, signage, and EV policy requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与巴基斯坦PSQCA标准采用、NEPRA公共充电站框架、IEC 61851/IEC 62196接口预期、并网、安全、计量、标识及电动汽车政策要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與巴基斯坦PSQCA標準採用、NEPRA公共充電站框架、IEC 61851/IEC 62196接口預期、併網、安全、計量、標識及電動汽車政策要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, PSQCA conformity assessment, NEPRA tariff or connection approval, utility energisation approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, designers, and installers should verify current Pakistan PSQCA, NEPRA, DISCO, K-Electric, provincial building/fire, tax, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、PSQCA符合性评定、NEPRA电价或接入批准、公用事业送电批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电运营商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核实现行巴基斯坦PSQCA、NEPRA、DISCO、K-Electric、省级建筑/消防、税务及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、PSQCA符合性評定、NEPRA電價或接入批准、公用事業送電批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電營運商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核實現行巴基斯坦PSQCA、NEPRA、DISCO、K-Electric、省級建築／消防、稅務及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Pakistan, the main gap is not a simple GB/T-to-PS mark substitution. Pakistan public EV charging stations must follow NEPRA's EV charging-station framework and applicable utility connection, metering, tariff, safety, signage, fire, IP, earthing, and connector expectations; the framework expressly points to PSQCA/NEECA-approved standards and international standards such as IEC, including IEC 61851-1 insulation and IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations. China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 files are useful baseline evidence but do not replace Pakistan site approval or IEC connector conformity.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口巴基斯坦时，核心差距不是简单用GB/T文件替代PS标志。巴基斯坦公共充电站需遵守NEPRA充电站框架及适用的公用事业接入、计量、电价、安全、标识、消防、IP防护、接地和接口要求；该框架明确指向PSQCA/NEECA批准标准及IEC等国际标准，包括IEC 61851-1绝缘要求和IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2接口预期。中国GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234文件可作为基线证据，但不能替代巴基斯坦现场批准或IEC接口符合性。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口巴基斯坦時，核心差距不是簡單用GB/T文件替代PS標誌。巴基斯坦公共充電站需遵守NEPRA充電站框架及適用的公用事業接入、計量、電價、安全、標識、消防、IP防護、接地和接口要求；該框架明確指向PSQCA/NEECA批准標準及IEC等國際標準，包括IEC 61851-1絕緣要求和IEC 62196 Type 2/CCS2接口預期。中國GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234文件可作為基線證據，但不能替代巴基斯坦現場批准或IEC接口符合性。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax, ministry, legal source, or primary standards catalogue preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
